channel.title: Open Source on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Open Source on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog

item.title: Open AI Launches Bug Fix
item.description:
Introduction to Open AI’s Initiative  

Open AI has recently announced a new initiative called “Patch the Planet,” which aims to help the open source community improve its cybersecurity and ward off bugs. This initiative is a collaboration between Open AI and the security company Trail of Bits, with the goal of providing open source maintainers with the necessary tools and expertise to secure their projects. In this article, we will delve into the details of this initiative, its potential impact on the open source community, and the broader implications for the tech industry.

item.title: Kyber: The Secret Tech Powering Millions of Future Robots
item.description:
The Man Behind VLC Is Now Building the Backbone of Physical AI  

Jean-Baptiste Kempf is a name that may not ring a bell for the average internet user, but his work has touched nearly every person on the planet. As the lead developer of VLC Media Player, Kempf helped create one of the most ubiquitous pieces of open-source software in history, with over 6 billion downloads to date. Now, he’s turning his attention to a challenge that could be even more transformative: building the infrastructure that will power millions of robots and drones in the real world.
